'''''Rusty Eagle''''' was a transport vessel used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to carry infantry and light vehicles into battle.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
